PrevailingDirection.description: The direction bin of the prevailing wind, defined as two values (in degrees) for the lower and upper values for the bin, where 0 degrees is north.

PrevailingPercentile95.description: The 95th percentile wind speed value in the prevailing direction.

PrevailingPercentile50.description: The median (50th percentile) wind speed value in the prevailing direction.

Percentile50.description: The median (50th percentile) wind speed value.

RatioOfCalmHours.description: The ratio of calm hours to total hours. Calm hours are hours with a wind speed of 1e-10 or less.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
